title: Earned Income Relief
text:
Earned Income Relief - SupportGoWhere
Earned Income Relief
Share link
Provides tax relief for individuals who are gainfully employed or carrying on a trade, business, profession or vocation.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Provides tax relief of up to $12,000
Collapse all sections
About this support

Receive tax relief of up to $8,000, depending on your age

Persons with Disabilities (PWDs) are granted increased relief of up to $12,000

Who is this for?

You are employed / self-employed and have received taxable earned income from your employment, pension or trade / business / profession / vocation in the previous year

To be considered eligible for higher relief, PWDs must have a permanent disability or mental impairment affecting work ability defined as follows:

Physical disability - requires assistance in any of the following 6 Activities of Daily Living (ADLs):

Washing or Bathing

Dressing

Feeding

Toileting

Transferring

Mobility

Mental disability - impaired in any of the following 3 activities:

Self Care and ADLs

Compliance to Psychiatric Treatment

Education or Work

How to apply?

The relief is granted automatically if you have taxable earned income

If you are claiming Earned Income Relief (Disability) for the first time, please email the following via myTax Mail:

Completed Tax Relief Form - Application for Claim of Disability - Related Tax Reliefs

Letter / supporting documents from the disability association, indicating details of the disabilities

Next, you must complete your Income Tax Return as follows:

If e-Filing, enter disability or mental impairment details under Section "4. Deductions, Reliefs and Parenthood Tax Rebate" > "Earned Income Relief"

If using paper filing, include handicap details in Appendix 2 of the Income Tax Form

Once claimed, the relief will be granted automatically in subsequent years if you are eligible

Where can I find help?

View more details

IRAS hotline: 1800-356-8300

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 17 Sep 2025
